findings.location: s5 (ListSearchInfoクラス) — code example for W11AC01SearchForm
findings.description: The source includes a constructor `W11AC01SearchForm(Map<String, Object> params)` that calls `setPageNumber((Integer) params.get("pageNumber"))`, showing the required pattern for extracting pageNumber from request params. This constructor implementation is entirely omitted from the knowledge file's code example.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block under ListSearchInfoクラス: `public W11AC01SearchForm(Map<String, Object> params) { setPageNumber((Integer) params.get("pageNumber")); }`

findings.description: The source's full action class example includes `ctx.setRequestScopedVar("searchResult", searchResult)` with the comment '// 検索結果をリクエストスコープに設定'. This step (setting search results to request scope for JSP rendering) is missing from the knowledge file's action code snippet.
The code example in s5 uses validation annotations @PropertyName, @Required, @NumberRange, @Digits on setPageNumber, but none of these annotation names are present in the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `@PropertyName("ページ番号") @Required @NumberRange(max = 10, min = 1) @Digits(integer = 2) public void setPageNumber(...)`
